subcodes.first_line: O thou who strivest to exalt the Word of God and servest His Cause! Several letters from that soul enraptured by the divine fragrances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ساعی در اعلاء کلمه الله و خادم امرالله چند محررات از آن منجذب بنفحات الله
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @firmness in the Covenant, @call to unity; prohibition of disunity, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
